title: Garp’s Last Stand on Hachinosu
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Marines, Unknown person #1, Kizaru, Unknown person #2, Bepo, Garp as Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.
scene: Garp and SWORD fight the Blackbeard Pirates on Hachinosu while Koby’s rescue becomes a turning point for the next generation of Marines.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: At the former Marine headquarters...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Lesson 1!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: An old man and a baby

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Going back in time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You are currently riding on a boat,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That can hold two persons...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What will you do?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I will get off the boat so

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The two of them can get to safety...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WRONG! You fool!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's better to leave the old man because he doesn't have long to live!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Excuse me, Vice-Admiral GARP!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What did you want to save by becoming a Marine Soldier?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The future of the people, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well then, you lot have more future than the old man!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you and the baby must live on!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PLEASE DON'T DO THAT KIND OF LECTURE AGAIN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ALL LIVES ARE EQUAL!!!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The future of the youngsters is limitless!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Several weeks ago on the island of women - Amazon Lily

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Vice-ADMIRAL! We can't do anything but watch our comrades get taken!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Permission from the top Brass never came!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's because the enemy is one of the four emperors!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: *Please save us! We don't know what they'll do to us on pirate Island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well if it isn't koby the hero! What's the matter?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't mind waging a full scale war against us?

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Captain Koby!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: He's a sword member, sir....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In exchange for the 800 Marine Soldiers and I battleship that you're about to take,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Will you take me alone instead?

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: C-Captain Koby!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You can't be serious....!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Zehahaha!! Seems like he's quite overestimating himself!!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: pirate Island - Hachinosu, Present Day.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: viA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a hand coming out from the island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a hand coming out from the island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Cannon attacks aren't working!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The cannons aren't even making a dent on it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's impossible! We can't evade it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Prepare to jump towards the sea! Everyone on board, get to the deck!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Protect the civilians!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes ma'am!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What ridiculous power...!

summary: This part advances the Garp’s Last Stand at Hachinosu through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
